title: IterumSMP (Kaiden's Edition)
description: A fork of the IterumSMP Client Pack with loads(!!!) of mods.
body:
![The IterumSMP logo with "Kaiden's Edition" written under it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d9ca2530664581c8442701d19ed4cce81b5afce.png)
**Welcome to the unofficial IterumSMP Client Pack made by literally one of it's developers (me!!!)**

While the [official client pack made by saamoff](https://modrinth.com/modpack/iterum) is lightweight and almost completely vanilla, mine has lots (AND LOTS) of mods that change the gameplay in a few ways while maintaining it compatible with the server.

It has my personal touch on it and none of the decisions made in this pack (besides the creation of it) had saamoff's opinion on it, so it's going to be a completely different experience if you've played the original pack.
